title: Deploy & Destroy
description: A simple mod that adds some useful tools and a few building blocks.
body:
## A collection of some useful tools, building blocks, and gameplay changes

### Deployer
Places blocks from its inventory.

### Destroyer
Breaks blocks and ejects their drops from its rear face.

### Detector
Emits a constant redstone signal when facing any opaque block

### Copper Pressure Plates
Only activated by players. Oxidize like other copper blocks. Can be waxed to halt oxidation progress.

### Upgradable Barrels
Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Netherite barrel tiers, each with additional storage. Upgrade with crafting recipes or in-place with associated upgrade items.

### Colored Redstone Lamps
A lamp for each dye color. Craft with dye or right-click with dye to change color.

### New Building Blocks
- Cracked and mossy brick variants, including stairs, slabs, and walls
- Mossy cobbled deepslate, including stairs, slabs, and walls
- Mossy deepslate bricks, including stairs, slabs, and walls
- Netherrack stairs, slabs, and walls
- Cut andesite, diorite, granite, and tuff, including slabs
- Grass bundles
- Charcoal blocks

### Blazing Coal
New fuel, crafted from blaze powder and coal. Smelts 4x as many items as coal.

### Nether Star Slab
Nether star slab

### Wrench
Right click on an orientable block to make it face toward you, or right click while sneaking to make it face away from you. \
Can be used by dispensers to make blocks face the same direction as the dispenser.

### In-World Sticky Piston Crafting
Right click a piston with a slime ball to convert it into a sticky piston.\
Scrape a sticky piston with an axe to convert it to a normal piston.

### Additional Useful Dispenser Behaviors
Dispensers can now:
- Scrape logs with axes
- Remove wax from waxed copper blocks with axes
- Lower copper oxidation levels with axes
- Empty/fill cauldrons with water, lava, and powdered snow
- Retrieve mushroom stew/suspicious stew from mooshrooms with bowls
- Feed flowers to brown mooshrooms to change their stew effects
- Cure villagers with golden apples

### Bucketable Striders
Striders can be picked with lava buckets.

### Additional Wandering Trader Trades
Glow berries have been added as a common trade.\
Sponges, wrenches, tadpole buckets, strider buckets, sniffer eggs, and mycelium have been added as rare trades.

### Shear Vines To Stop Growth
Vines will no longer grow after being sheared

### Loyalty Tridents Return From Void
Tridents with the loyalty enchantment will return to the player when thrown into the void.

### Deepslate Generators
Cobblestone and stone generators below y0 will now generate their respective deepslate variants.

### Deepslate Dungeons
Dungeons generated below y0 use cobbled deepslate and mossy cobbled deepslate instead of their cobblestone counterparts.

### Husk, Stray, and Bogged Dungeons
Dungeons may rarely generate with a husk, stray, or bogged spawner.

### Additional Farmable Materials
- Sand piles, dropped from husks, can be crafted into sand blocks
- Ice shards, dropped from strays, can be crafted into ice blocks
- Moss balls, dropped from bogged, can be crafted into moss blocks
- Quartz chunks, smelted from ghast tears, can be crafted into nether quartz
